title: Chopper Controls Monster Point
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is chopper controls monster point.
scene: The scene follows chopper controls monster point, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So you leap into the air...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...right into the path of my deadly shoulder-mounted cannons!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: EHA?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Whaa Aaaat?! Cannons from the shoulders ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Franky cannon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ka-chunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Those are your shoulders !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But you're too cool, as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Staree

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: UGH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What a tricky opponent!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: General Crusher!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So heavy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't look as tough as those monsters

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just because I'm scared, doesn't mean I'm weak!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't underestimate the power of weatherian science!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: SORCERY CLIMA TACT!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Gjust sword!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Gueee Hhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ugh... Now we're right out in the open!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I mustn't lose heart. I'm not the man I used to be!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HISSATSU: Midoribosh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Take- Javelin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Guaa ahhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Master Heraclesun !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll never forget the two years I spent with you in the deadly swindling forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They have prepared me for the second chapter in the great adventures of the mighty USOPP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just look at them all!! They fight with such vigour...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's almost as though they've been longing for a fight like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kyak Kyah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll fill this whole plaza full of pitfalls!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No robot or pirate can survive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Once I've got them beneath the ground!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KYAH! What was that?! I thought I just heard someone else digging down here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: gyahh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa!! Daruma-san just came hurtling out the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who's there !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's me!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Horn point!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not the only one who's good at digging!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chopper!! You can turn into a tag beetle now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm not a beetle!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've spent these past two years improving all seven of my transformation points!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: There's only one form I need the rumble ball for now!!

summary: Chopper Controls Monster Point. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
